title: WeatherPrufe Paints celebrating two years of the best paint
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - WeatherPrufe Paints is celebrating its second birthday. The specialty paint and waterproofing store in George opened in 2022 and is going from strength to strength. WeatherPrufe Paints prides itself in providing coastal homeowners with the best waterproofing acrylic product, Elastocryl waterproofing, around.


> The company has the best painting products on the market. Customers can choose from more than 50 high-standard products.


It provides clients with high-quality, hassle-free paint and waterproofing, with up to a 10-year guarantee.

Dawid Wandrag of WeatherPrufe says, "I have almost 30 years' experience in the painting business. We started using WeatherPrufe products 16 years ago and have never found a better product."

Elastocryl is a pure acrylic binder for maximum weather resistance and ultraviolet resistance. It is flexible, yet non-tacky and has high-volume solids with fibre for maximum film thickness.

In the Garden Route area, WeatherPrufe Paints and Elastocryl waterproofing have been used for years with great success in the Garden Route at Fancourt, Kingswood, Oubaai, Pinnacle Point, Pezula and other developments, such as Heuwelsrust and Karookraal and the whole of the Southern Cape.

The WeatherPrufe team will ensure your home gets painted with a water base that is environmentally and applicator friendly. WeatherPrufe Elastocryl dries quicker than conventional acrylic waterproofing or any other product on the South African market.

Stock can be purchased at the store and WeatherPrufe Paints also sells paint to contractors.

Visit WeatherPrufe Paints, Shop 21 in the Precap Centre on Courtenay Street (Mini Pick n Pay). Contact WeatherPrufe Southern Cape and Garden Route for a free quotation today: Dawid Wandrag 082 977 7802.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
